name: Quickshot
description: A Tediore pistol with Vladof parts, the Quickshot leans into speed: higher fire rate and magazine size, plus reduced recoil, at the cost of lower accuracy. As with other Tediore weapons, frequent reloads can boost overall damage thanks to the thrown-gun reload effect. The Quickshot helps you take advantage of this by firing quickly between reloads, making rapid reload loops easier to maintain even at closer ranges.
notes: Spawns at green rarity or higher. Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
